# CTUnderlineStyleModifiers

**Structure**

Underline style modifiers.

## Declaration

```swift
struct CTUnderlineStyleModifiers
```

## Overview

You can apply these underline style modifiers to the underline style ([doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTUnderlineStyle]) that you set with the [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/kCTUnderlineStyleAttributeName] attribute. These modifiers control the pattern of the underline.

## Constants

- **patternSolid**: A modifier that indicates to draw a solid underline.
- **patternDot**: A modifier that indicates to draw an underline using a pattern of dots.
- **patternDash**: A modifier that indicates to draw an underline using a pattern of dashes.
- **patternDashDot**: A modifier that indicates to draw an underline using a pattern of alternating dashes and dots.
- **patternDashDotDot**: A modifier that indicates to draw an underline using a pattern of a dash followed by two dots.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates an underline style modifiers structure with the specified raw value.

## Constants

- **String Attribute Name Constants**: These constants represent string attribute names.
- **CTUnderlineStyle**: Underline style specifiers.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
